Fall 31-180 Day Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a fall at any time in the last two to six months prior to admission/entry or reentry. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
9=Unable to Determine
^=Blank(skip pattern)
363 J1700C_FRCTR_SIX_MO_CD J1700C_FRCTR_SIX_MO_CD J1700C Fall History on Admission: Fall Six Month Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had any fracture related to a fall in the six months prior to
